top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SELECT SUM(e.cost) 
         FROM expense e
         JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
         JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
         WHERE ev.event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff') * 100.0 /
        (SELECT SUM(e.cost) 
         FROM expense e
         JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id), 2) AS percentage_cost

WITH total_cost AS (
    SELECT 
        e.event_id,
        e.event_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(exp.cost), 0) AS total_expense
    FROM event e
    LEFT JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
    LEFT JOIN expense exp ON b.budget_id = exp.link_to_budget
    GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
),
total_all_events AS (
    SELECT SUM(total_expense) AS grand_total
    FROM total_cost
),
kickoff_cost AS (
    SELECT total_expense AS kickoff_total
    FROM total_cost
    WHERE event_name = 'Year...

        e.event_name,
        COALESCE(SUM(exp.cost), 0) AS event_total_cost
    FROM event e
    LEFT JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event

),
summary AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(event_total_cost) AS grand_total,
        MAX(CASE WHEN event_name = 'Yearly Kickoff' THEN event_total_cost ELSE 0 END) AS kickoff_cost
    FROM event_exp...

        (SELECT SUM(e.cost)

         JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
         JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id

        (SELECT SUM(e.cost) 
         FROM expense e
         JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id), 2) AS percentage_cost
